description_long: This hotel complex features a modern, sprawling layout with multiple interconnected buildings, including a central main structure, several outbuildings, and extensive outdoor amenities. The grounds include two large tennis courts, a swimming pool with poolside seating, and landscaped green areas. The main building is multi-storied with large windows, flat roofs, and a mix of glass and concrete facades, giving it a contemporary appearance. There are several parking areas, outdoor seating arrangements, and what appears to be a garden or patio space. The property is enclosed by low walls and includes driveways and walkways connecting the various sections. The overall design emphasizes luxury, recreation, and accessibility, suitable for an upscale urban or suburban environment.
description: A modern, multi-building hotel complex with tennis courts, a pool, landscaped grounds, and extensive glass and concrete facades. The design is contemporary and luxurious, featuring multiple amenities and outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the tennis courts, pool area with lounge chairs, and the main hotel building with its large windows and flat roofs.
description_view_1: From this angle, the driveway, parking areas, and the rear of the main building are visible, along with several outbuildings and landscaped lawns.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the central courtyard, garden spaces, and the arrangement of the main and secondary buildings, emphasizing the interconnected layout.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the side of the hotel with the tennis courts, additional parking, and the rear facades of the main and secondary buildings.
